input: Generate competing hypotheses for: A BRAF V600E melanoma patient initially responds to vemurafenib+cobimetinib but progresses after 8 months. NGS shows no new BRAF/NRAS/MEK mutations.

expected_hypotheses: MAPK pathway reactivation via non-mutational mechanism (e.g., BRAF amplification)
tumor heterogeneity with resistant subclone expansion

input: Generate hypotheses for: Patients with higher baseline inflammatory markers (CRP, IL-6) paradoxically show BETTER response to a novel anti-inflammatory biologic.

expected_hypotheses: higher inflammation = more drug target available = greater response
inflammatory subtype is mechanistically distinct and more responsive
floor effect — low-inflammation patients have less room to improve
confounding by disease severity (sicker patients treated more aggressively)

input: Generate hypotheses for: Female patients show 40% higher response rate to a novel kinase inhibitor than males in a Phase 2 trial.

input: Generate hypotheses for: Countries with higher BCG vaccination coverage have lower COVID-19 mortality rates (ecological observation).

input: Generate hypotheses for: A U-shaped dose-response curve where both low and high doses of a HDAC inhibitor kill cancer cells, but intermediate doses promote growth.
